subject: WM-0064 ready for review
body: Repaired remaining WM-0064 bounded-read findings: obligation due queries and town-rule compliance now expose explicit scan caps, report scan-cap hits and actual visited counts, and focused regressions cover tail-match/no-match due scans plus out-of-time town-rule rows before in-time matches; typecheck, m4-obligations tests, validate, diff-check, and quality all pass.
